tasks.subject: Task 1: Scaffold statusline_render crate + style->ANSI parser
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the `statusline_render` crate and its pure `style` module that turns a cship-like style spec into a 24-bit ANSI wrapper.

**Files:**
- Create: crates/statusline_render/Cargo.toml
- Create: crates/statusline_render/src/lib.rs
- Create: crates/statusline_render/src/style.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- cargo build -p statusline_render succeeds
- apply_style("", "x") returns "x"
- apply_style("bold fg:#7aa2f7", "x") returns the 24-bit ANSI wrapper
- invalid hex and unknown tokens ignored

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p statusline_render

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/statusline_render/Cargo.toml", "crates/statusline_render/src/lib.rs", "crates/statusline_render/src/style.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p statusline_render", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cargo build -p statusline_render succeeds", "apply_style blank spec returns text unchanged", "apply_style bold+fg produces 24-bit ANSI wrapper", "invalid hex and unknown tokens ignored"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: StatuslineConfig section in settings
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a curated, additive `statusline` config (theme, line templates, per-segment styles + integer thresholds) to settings::Settings, no schema version bump.

**Files:**
- Create: crates/settings/src/statusline.rs
- Modify: crates/settings/src/lib.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- StatuslineConfig::default curated (theme dark, cost warn 2_000_000 micro-USD, context warn 40, usage warn 70, show_pace true)
- absent section defaults to curated config without version bump
- custom config round-trips save/load
- Settings still derives Eq (integer thresholds only)

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p settings

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/settings/src/statusline.rs", "crates/settings/src/lib.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p settings", "acceptanceCriteria": ["StatuslineConfig::default values are curated", "absent statusline section defaults to curated config without version bump", "custom statusline config round-trips save/load", "Settings still derives Eq"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Extend claude_statusline parser with model + context fields
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface model.display_name and context_window.used_percentage on StatuslineSnapshot with drift tolerance matching the existing parser.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/claude_statusline/src/types.rs
- Modify: crates/claude_statusline/src/parse.rs
- Modify: crates/claude_statusline/tests/real_payload.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- parse(FULL).model_display_name == Some("Opus"); context_used_percent ~= 4.2
- absent model/context_window yield None without error
- existing parser tests still pass
- real_payload fixture test asserts the new fields

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p claude_statusline

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/claude_statusline/src/types.rs", "crates/claude_statusline/src/parse.rs", "crates/claude_statusline/tests/real_payload.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p claude_statusline", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parse surfaces model.display_name and context_window.used_percentage", "absent model/context_window yield None without error", "existing parser tests still pass", "real_payload fixture test asserts the new fields"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Renderer core - segments, layout, countdown, pace (plain text)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement statusline_render::render producing the configured lines in plain text (model, context_bar, cost, usage 5h/7d with reset countdown + pace). Coloring stubbed via a single paint seam. Cross-provider placeholders render empty.

**Files:**
- Create: crates/statusline_render/src/render.rs
- Modify: crates/statusline_render/src/lib.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- default layout renders model/context/cost/5h+7d with reset countdown and pace arrow (color=false)
- absent segments collapse: no unfilled placeholders, no double spaces, no blank lines
- render is pure for fixed (snapshot, config, now)

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p statusline_render

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/statusline_render/src/render.rs", "crates/statusline_render/src/lib.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p statusline_render", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default layout renders model/context/cost/5h+7d with countdown and pace arrow", "absent segments collapse cleanly", "render is pure"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Threshold coloring via the paint seam
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fill the paint seam so segments emit per-tone ANSI from config (base/warn/critical styles), gated by the color flag. No other renderer change.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/statusline_render/src/render.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- color=false emits no ANSI escapes
- color=true wraps a critical-tone segment in the configured critical_style ANSI
- blank style string yields no escapes even with color=true

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p statusline_render

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/statusline_render/src/render.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p statusline_render", "acceptanceCriteria": ["color=false emits no ANSI escapes", "color=true wraps toned segment in configured critical_style ANSI", "blank style yields no escapes even with color=true"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Rewire balanze-cli statusline onto the renderer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace format_statusline_from_snapshot with statusline_render::render (load settings, color from NO_COLOR only, now=Utc::now(), cross=None), keep the IPC snapshot write + frozen no-arg contract, update tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/balanze_cli/Cargo.toml
- Modify: crates/balanze_cli/src/statusline.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- statusline prints new multi-line rendered output and still writes the IPC snapshot
- color gated on NO_COLOR only, not TTY
- parse error prints non-empty fallback without panic
- snapshot-write tests retained; literal updated with new fields; render smoke test added

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p balanze_cli; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/balanze_cli/Cargo.toml", "crates/balanze_cli/src/statusline.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p balanze_cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["statusline prints new multi-line output and still writes the IPC snapshot", "color gated on NO_COLOR only not TTY", "parse error prints non-empty fallback without panic", "snapshot-write tests retained, literal updated, render smoke test added"]}
```
